nasb.text: In Damascus the ethnarch under Aretas the king was guarding the city of the Damascenes in order to seize me,

esv.text: At Damascus, the governor under King Aretas was guarding the city of Damascus in order to seize me,

cnv.text: 在大馬士革，亞里達王手下的總督把守著大馬士革城，要拘捕我，

ccb.text: 在大马士革的时候，亚哩达王手下的总督吩咐人把守城门，要逮捕我。

csbs.text: 在大马士革，阿瑞塔斯王的总督看守了大马士革城，要抓我，
